articles.title: 'You deserve a National Award': Bharathiraja praises Raadhika’s Performance in ‘Thaai Kizhavi’, actress responds with heartfelt promise
articles.description: Veteran filmmaker Bharathiraja praised actress Raadhika Sarathkumar's performance in her film 'Thaai Kizhavi'. Raadhika visited Bharathiraja as he recovers from a health scare. She expressed her gratitude, promising to seek his blessings if she receives a National Award. This interaction highlights their enduring bond and the respect Bharathiraja commands in the film industry. Several personalities visited him during his recovery.

articles.title: Anand Mahindra’s Monday motivation is a nonagenarian who proves you can change your life’s script any day
articles.description: Anand Mahindra Monday Motivation: Anand Mahindra has highlighted the inspiring journey of Prabhavati Bhagwati, a 98-year-old entrepreneur from Ahmedabad, who started her home-based venture “Nani’s Nashta” after personal loss. Her story of resilience and late-life entrepreneurship, built on traditional Gujarati food and word-of-mouth success, is now motivating people across generations to believe that it’s never too late to start anew.

articles.title: Archana Puran Singh reveals how Kapil Sharma Show stalled her four-decade-long acting career, says 'nobody is offering roles'
articles.description: Archana Puran Singh Acting Career Stalled: Archana Puran Singh revealed her long stint on The Kapil Sharma Show brought fame but limited film roles due to tight schedules. The shift to Netflix's season-based format now offers her flexibility for new projects. Despite a four-decade career, she feels filmmakers still perceive her solely as a laughing personality, hoping recent work will change this.

articles.title: You won’t spot it at first, until the camera zooms in on the snake hiding in plain sight
articles.description: A viral video reveals a snake perfectly camouflaged in a home's corner, highlighting how easily these creatures blend into their surroundings. Snakes often enter homes seeking food or shelter, then remain hidden in quiet spots. This serves as a stark reminder to pay closer attention to overlooked areas within our own living spaces.

articles.title: Quote of the day by American comedian Richard Pryor: ‘I urge you to ask yourself just how honorable it is to preside over the abuse...’
articles.description: Richard Pryor, a legendary comedian, used his platform to address uncomfortable truths. His powerful words challenged society's casual acceptance of animal suffering. Pryor's message called for a moral examination of our actions and complicity. He believed that true honor lies in compassion for all creatures. His legacy extends beyond laughter to a call for empathy and justice.
